query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A dark human silhouette stands against a bright warm-toned sky near the horizon, with circular light reflections scattered across a dark foreground surface suggesting water or wet ground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred dark human silhouette dissolves into soft indistinct form against an overexposed bright sky, with the figure's features and edges completely lost to intentional soft focus; circular bokeh lights scatter across a murky foreground while the entire image abandons sharp detail in favor of ethereal abstraction, rendering the subject as a ghostly shape without texture or definable structure.
